description_long: This fast food restaurant features a rectangular, single-story structure with a prominent brown gabled roof and a mix of white and stone-textured exterior walls. Large windows line the front and sides, allowing for ample natural light and visibility into the dining area. The main entrance is marked by a red awning and a bold, illuminated sign displaying the restaurant's name in white text. A drive-thru lane wraps around one side of the building, with a dedicated drive-thru window and menu board visible. The property is surrounded by a paved lot, providing space for vehicle access and parking. The overall design is clean and modern, with simple geometric lines and a color palette dominated by brown, white, gray, and red accents.
description: A modern, single-story fast food restaurant with a brown gabled roof, large windows, and a red awning sign. Features a drive-thru lane and a clean, geometric exterior with stone and white walls.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the building, brown roof, large windows, and the drive-thru lane wrapping around the property.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, red awning, illuminated signage, and the symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the drive-thru window, menu board, and the stone-textured wall section at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back entrance, service area, and the continuation of the brown roof and stone wall features.
attribute_signage: Wall-mounted illuminated sign above the main entrance, rectangular in shape, with a red background and white text reading 'Ruby House'. Additional smaller red signs are present above the drive-thru window and rear entrance.
attribute_logo: A rectangular red logo with white text 'Ruby House' is visible above the main entrance and on the drive-thru window. The logo is simple, bold, and easily recognizable.
attribute_drive-thru_window: Present on the right side of the building, featuring a dedicated window, a red awning, and an adjacent menu board. The drive-thru lane is clearly marked and wraps around the building.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary fast food style with modern geometric lines, a gabled brown roof, large glass windows, stone-textured wall accents, and a clean, functional layout. The color scheme is dominated by neutral tones with bold red signage.
